legal_strategy: Promote DOGE as a payment method, not as guaranteed investment performance.
Prioritize merchant acceptance, public receipt-level proof, and repeat purchases.
Use existing compliance-aware payment rails where appropriate.
Disclose sponsorships, holdings, incentives, and merchant relationships.
Avoid coordinated buying, fabricated adoption metrics, misleading scarcity claims, or pressure tactics.

six_month_targets.focus: merchant clusters and weekly spend events
checkout templates and support office hours
proof compounding and merchant case studies

merchant_segments.name: gaming and creator merch
merchant_segments.why: community overlap, online fulfillment, visible proof posts

merchant_segments.name: food trucks and local quick serve
merchant_segments.why: small tickets, repeat spend, city-based events

merchant_segments.name: pet, rescue, and community shops
merchant_segments.why: natural brand affinity and cause-linked purchase campaigns
